title: executor: Result is not stable when executing UNION ALL + LIMIT.
description:
## Bug Report
Result is not stable when executing UNION ALL + LIMIT.

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```
CREATE TABLE `vm_interview`  (
  `id` varchar(255),
  `create_date` datetime ,
  `is_delete` varchar(1),
  `status` int(11),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ;
(SELECT
	vi.id,
	vi.create_date,
	vi.status
	FROM
	test vi
	WHERE
	vi.is_delete = 0
	AND vi.status in(1, 2, 4, 5, 9)
	ORDER BY
	vi.create_date DESC
)
UNION ALL
(
	SELECT
	vi.id,
	vi.create_date,
	vi.status
	FROM
	test vi
	WHERE
	vi.is_delete = 0
	AND vi.STATUS IN ( 3, 6, 7, 8, 10 )
	ORDER BY
	vi.create_date DESC
	,FIELD(vi.status, 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 9, 3, 6, 8,10)
)
LIMIT 0,15;


```
<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
result need be stable.
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
result is unstable,switch between follow two results:
```
mysql> (SELECT vi.id, vi.create_date, vi.status FROM test vi WHERE vi.is_delete = 0 AND vi.status in(1, 2, 4, 5, 9) ORDER BY vi.create_date DESC ) UNION ALL ( SELECT vi.id, vi.create_date, vi.status FROM test vi WHERE vi.is_delete = 0 AND vi.STATUS IN ( 3, 6, 7, 8, 10 ) ORDER BY vi.create_date DESC ,FIELD(vi.status, 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 9, 3, 6, 8,10) ) LIMIT 0,15;
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table ( id INTEGER NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, PRIMARY KEY (id));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, is_active) VALUES (1, 'Alice', TRUE), (2, 'Bob', FALSE), (3, 'Charlie', TRUE), (4, 'David', TRUE), (5, 'Eve', FALSE);
CREATE TABLE vm_interview ( id VARCHAR(255), create_date TIMESTAMP, is_delete VARCHAR(1) DEFAULT '0', status INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY (id));

SELECT vi.id, vi.create_date, vi.status FROM vm_interview vi WHERE vi.is_delete = '0' AND vi.status IN (1, 2, 4, 5, 9) ORDER BY vi.create_date DESC UNION ALL SELECT vi.id, vi.create_date, vi.status FROM vm_interview vi WHERE vi.is_delete = '0' AND vi.status IN (3, 6, 7, 8, 10) ORDER BY vi.create_date DESC, CASE vi.status WHEN 1 THEN 1 WHEN 2 THEN 2 WHEN 4 THEN 3 WHEN 5 THEN 4 WHEN 7 THEN 5 WHEN 9 THEN 6 WHEN 3 THEN 7 WHEN 6 THEN 8 WHEN 8 THEN 9 WHEN 10 THEN 10 END LIMIT 15;
key_bug_features: UNION ALL with LIMIT causes unstable results
